name: Previewer Toolkit
description: High-performance image rendering engine that generates preview images entirely from URL parameters. Generate OG images, social cards, browser mockups, terminal screenshots, profile cards, code snippets, and more — all customizable via URL. Also includes a Meta Inspector tool to analyze any URL's meta, Open Graph, and Twitter Card tags.
author: Shamrouz Awan
icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='3' y='3' width='18' height='18' rx='2'/><circle cx='8.5' cy='8.5' r='1.5'/><polyline points='21 15 16 10 5 21'/></svg>

meta.title: Previewer Toolkit — OG Image Generator & Meta Inspector
meta.description: Generate OG images, social cards, browser mockups, profile cards, code snippets and more from URL parameters. Includes a Meta Inspector to analyze any URL's meta and Open Graph tags. No uploads, no storage.
